architectReview.evidence: Final G005 review is clean. AI slop cleanup reports agent://148-G005CleanupCodeFinal and agent://149-G005CleanupDocsFinal returned CLEAR with blockers empty. Code review agent://150-G005ArchitectCodeClean confirmed exact CategoryPlaybook and PromptTemplate queries are separated from partial fallbacks, generationContext reaches blog/search adapters, and no blockers remain. Docs/tests review agent://151-G005ArchitectDocsClean confirmed jose signed-cookie paperclip_session + CSRF docs and meaningful G005/auth-drift tests. Earlier QA blockers for exact-priority truncation and source-string-only coverage were resolved and rerun cleanly.

executorQa.evidence: Executor QA agent://152-G005ExecutorQaFinal passed with no blockers. Leader verification after final fixes passed: artifact://1041 Biome write, artifact://1045 focused p3/p1 tests with 57 passing tests, artifact://1049 Biome check, artifact://1055 typecheck, artifact://1061 full npm test with 144 passing tests, and Prisma validate. QA adversarial coverage passed for exact-match exclusion by partial truncation, missing blog/search context wiring, unbounded queries, wrong PromptTemplate selection, stale NextAuth/Bearer wording, and tests passing while behavior is absent.

artifactRefs.description: Leader verification report with focused/full test, typecheck, Biome, Prisma validate, and blocker-resolution evidence.

contractCoverage.obligation: Exact active product/company category playbooks are fetched before broad topic-token partials and bounded before adapter use.
Exact prompt-template aliases are fetched before partial fallback and selected into ContentInput.generationContext.
generateContentPackage and generateSearchStructure pass loaded generationContext to adapter calls.
Planning docs describe jose paperclip_session + CSRF auth and do not present NextAuth.js/Bearer/JWT-token issuance as implementation.

surfaceEvidence.invocation: npm test -- tests/p3-contract.test.ts tests/p1-auth-company-profile.test.ts; npm test; npm run typecheck; npx biome check relevant files; npx prisma validate
npm test -- tests/p1-auth-company-profile.test.ts via focused p1/p3 test run

adversarialCases.scenario: 24 broad partial category matches exist alongside an exact active category playbook.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: The exact category playbook remains selected first and cannot be truncated away by partial query ordering.

adversarialCases.scenario: A high-version partial template name shadows the exact blog_draft_generation template.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: The exact template is selected before partial fallback regardless of partial version.

adversarialCases.scenario: Blog draft service omits generationContext from adapter input.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Runtime service test fails unless generateBlogDraft receives generationContext.

adversarialCases.scenario: Search structure service omits generationContext from adapter input.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Runtime service test fails unless generateSearchStructure receives generationContext.

adversarialCases.scenario: Playbook/template tables contain many partial matches.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Every Prisma findMany call is bounded and returned context is sliced before adapter use.

adversarialCases.scenario: Planning docs still describe NextAuth.js, NEXTAUTH_URL, Bearer token, or JWT-token issuance semantics.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Contract tests fail unless docs describe jose paperclip_session + CSRF and reject stale wording.

adversarialCases.scenario: Generation services become no-ops while source-string sentinels remain present.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Runtime module-boundary service tests fail because adapter calls and persistence/status side effects are asserted.

iteration.evidence: AI SLOP CLEANUP REPORT: agent://148-G005CleanupCodeFinal and agent://149-G005CleanupDocsFinal were CLEAR with no blockers. Blocking QA and architecture findings were fixed by exact-first CategoryPlaybook/PromptTemplate queries plus behavior-level runtime wiring tests; the full verification loop reran cleanly with Biome, focused tests, typecheck, full npm test, Prisma validate, architect reviews, and executor QA all passing.
